title: Unposted Updates / Drafts Alert Icon
excerpt: I am finding that updates are not always posted: user error, caching web browser issue, etc. It would be helpful if there was an icon to alert you to an unposted draft.

posts.author: FOCSandy (Sandy)
posts.cookedHtml: I am finding that updates are not always posted: user error, caching web browser issue, etc. It would be helpful if there was an icon to alert you to an unposted draft.

posts.author: justinerianne (Justine Rianne Diza)
posts.cookedHtml: This! It would be really helpful to see all the posts/tasks we need to respond to with a saved draft. It’s already nice that we have the auto-update of the drafts available but having this alongside it will ensure nothing is missed on Monday.com!
